data.title: RED: Write failing test for scenario-driven SC revision
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/hooks/test-scenario-sc-revision.sh asserting brainstorm SKILL.md contains SC revision logic after Step 2.75 and re-approval via AskUserQuestion.

Insertion point: after Step 3 (Scenario Analysis Output in Epic Spec), insert SC gap check.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/hooks/test-scenario-sc-revision.sh
- [ ] Test fails (RED)
  Verify: ! bash tests/hooks/test-scenario-sc-revision.sh 2>/dev/null
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED markers
  Verify: grep 'brainstorm/SKILL' .test-index | grep -q '\[test_'
